description: This jewelcrafting design is used for the Jewelcrafting profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Urgronn. In the Jewelcrafting Designs category.
name: Design: Dawnstone Crab

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Design: Dawnstone Crab Item Level 74 Binds when picked up Requires Jewelcrafting (370) Requires Thrallmar - Revered Use: Teaches you how to craft a Dawnstone Crab. Sell Price: 3 Figurine - Dawnstone Crab Item Level 115 Binds when picked up Unique Trinket Requires Level 70 Requires Jewelcrafting (350) Equip: Increases defense rating by 32. Use: Increases dodge rating by 125 for 20 sec. (2 Min Cooldown) Sell Price: 1 50 Requires Khorium Bar (4), Dawnstone (2), Golden Draenite (4) This jewelcrafting design is used for the Jewelcrafting profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Urgronn. In the Jewelcrafting Designs category.
